_comment: FlareGunAirdropMod — server configuration. Copy to your server profile folder.

flare._comment_shotsPerState: Shots before the gun drops one health tier (1-3 recommended)
flare._comment_minTriggerPitch: Degrees above horizontal the flare gun must be aimed (read server-side at the shot) to trigger an airdrop. Firing flat or into a ceiling/roof does nothing. 0 = horizontal, 90 = straight up.
flare._comment_minTriggerAltitude: (legacy, unused) was used by the old flare-altitude trigger.
flare._comment_maxTriggerRadius: Max horizontal distance (metres) from shooter to count as a valid signal
flare._comment_airdropSpawnHeight: How many metres above the ground the crate spawns before it descends
flare._comment_airdropDescentSpeed: How fast (metres/second) the crate falls from the sky
flare._comment_airdropLifetime: Seconds the landed crate stays in the world before it despawns (1800 = 30 min). Currently 300 = 5 min for testing. Ignored when airdropDespawnEnabled is false.
flare._comment_airdropDespawnEnabled: true = crate despawns after airdropLifetime and cannot be picked up (default). false = crate never despawns on its own and becomes takeable/pickable - a player can loot it, drag it into their base, and store gear in it exactly like a normal SeaChest. The moment it's moved even slightly from where it landed, this mod stops tracking it completely: it's now a normal SeaChest for all purposes, and its fate (e.g. if the owner abandons the base) is entirely up to vanilla DayZ, not this mod. Only a crate that is NEVER moved - i.e. genuinely abandoned, nobody ever claimed it - gets cleaned up automatically, and only after airdropMaxAgeDays.
flare._comment_airdropMaxAgeDays: Only used when airdropDespawnEnabled is false, and only for a crate that has never been moved from its drop spot. After this many in-game days of sitting untouched, it's treated as abandoned and removed. A crate that's been claimed/moved is never subject to this - see airdropDespawnEnabled. 0 = an untouched crate is also kept forever (no litter cleanup at all).
flare._comment_airdropContainerClass: DayZ class name of the container used for airdrops (FGAM_AirdropContainer = big-cargo crate added by this mod)
flare._comment_red_zone: Red flare — toxic zone. redZoneDelay = seconds before the zone spawns; after spawning, the dynamic gas plays a short artillery announcement then appears. redZoneDuration = seconds before the zone + crate are removed. NOTE: redZoneRadius is currently unused — the dynamic gas zone uses its own built-in ~120m footprint.

loot_RED._comment: Items spawned inside crate for RED flare. Use exact DayZ class names.

loot_BLACK._comment: Top-tier weapon cache. Black smoke only — no light.

loot_ORANGE._comment: Construction tools and rare vehicle parts

spawnWeights._comment: Weighted probabilities for flare color when gun spawns at each location type. Sum can be any value — ratios matter.
